entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A grain crop developed for high yield and specific grain qualities in Mali

entities.name: PEDIGREE BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding method used to develop improved sorghum cultivars

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The ability of a cultivar to produce a large amount of grain

entities.name: WHITE SEED
entities.description: A grain color attribute desired for processing and consumer preference

entities.name: TAN PLANT
entities.description: A specific plant color attribute of the developed sorghum cultivars

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD SENSITIVITY
entities.description: The response of the plant to the length of day/night cycles

entities.name: SUDANIAN AND SAHELIAN CONDITIONS
entities.description: Agro-ecological conditions in Mali to which the cultivars are adapted

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The country where the research and cultivar development took place

entities.name: GRAIN QUALITY
entities.description: The overall physical and chemical attributes of the grain affecting its value

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The process of mating different sorghum races to combine desirable traits

entities.name: GUINEA RACE
entities.description: A specific race of sorghum used in the breeding process

entities.name: CAUDATUM RACE
entities.description: A specific race of sorghum used in the breeding process

entities.name: YIELD AND GRAIN QUALITY TRIALS
entities.description: Evaluation process conducted on-station and on-farm to test advanced lines

entities.name: FARMER PARTICIPATORY SELECTION
entities.description: A selection process involving farmers in choosing the best cultivars

entities.name: DECORTICATION YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain recovered after removing the outer hull

entities.name: TADD
entities.description: Tangential Abrasive Dehuller Device used to measure decortication yield

entities.name: SHELF LIFE
entities.description: The length of time processed flour remains usable

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A crop whose flour was partially substituted with sorghum flour

entities.name: LOOSE PANICLE
entities.description: A morphological characteristic of the Guinea race type sorghum

entities.name: LONG GLUMES
entities.description: A morphological characteristic of the Guinea race type sorghum

entities.name: HARD GRAIN
entities.description: A physical characteristic of the grain

entities.name: N’TENIMISSA
entities.description: A specific high-yielding, white-seeded, tan-plant sorghum cultivar developed in Mali

entities.name: WHITE ENDOSPERM
entities.description: The internal white color of the sorghum grain

entities.name: THIN PERICARP
entities.description: A thin outer layer of the sorghum grain

entities.name: ORGANOLEPTIC PARAMETERS
entities.description: Sensory attributes used to evaluate the quality of biscuits

entities.name: DELIKEN
entities.description: A commercial biscuit product made with sorghum flour

entities.name: GENERAL ALIMENTATION DU MALI
entities.description: The company that commercially manufactures Deliken biscuits

entities.name: COMMERCIAL SUPPLY CHAIN
entities.description: The system linking smallholder farmers to grain traders and industry

entities.name: PUBLIC-PRIVATE PARTNERSHIP
entities.description: A collaborative framework linking smallholders to the commercial supply chain
